attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXCP_ACCOUNT_RULES)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.RULE_ID, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.RULE_NAME, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.MODEL_NAME_ID, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.SOURCE_ID, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.RULE_DISPLAY_SEQUENCE, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.TRANSACTION_TABLE, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.TRANSACTION_TYPE, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.TRANSACTION_CLASS, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.ENTITY_TYPE, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.RULE_VALUE_NAME, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.CHANGE_SIGN, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.EXTENDED_VALUES, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.TARGET_TYPE_ID, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.TARGET_TABLE, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.RULE_TYPE, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.TRANSACTION_CLASS_REPLACEMENT, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.ENTERED_VALUE_ATTRIBUTE_ID, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.ENTERED_CURR_ATTRIBUTE_ID, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.ACCOUNTED_VALUE_ATTRIBUTE_ID, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.ACCOUNTED_CURR_ATTRIBUTE_ID, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.RULE_CATEGORY_1, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.RULE_CATEGORY_2, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.NO_ROUNDING, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.ROUNDING_GROUP, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.PAIR_A_VALUE_ATTRIBUTE_ID, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.PAIR_A_CURR_ATTRIBUTE_ID, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.PAIR_A_EXCH_DATE_ATTRIBUTE_ID, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.PAIR_A_EXCH_TYPE_ATTRIBUTE_ID, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.PAIR_A_EXCH_RATE_ATTRIBUTE_ID, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.PAIR_B_VALUE_ATTRIBUTE_ID, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.PAIR_B_CURR_ATTRIBUTE_ID, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.PAIR_B_EXCH_DATE_ATTRIBUTE_ID, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.PAIR_B_EXCH_TYPE_ATTRIBUTE_ID, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.PAIR_B_EXCH_RATE_ATTRIBUTE_ID, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.ACTIVE, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.ASSOCIATE_RULE_ID, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.ZERO_SUPPRESSION_RULE, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.REPORT_SETTLEMENT_RULE, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.REPORT_RECONCILE_LOCAL, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.REPORT_IC_RULE, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.COST_PLUS_RULE, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.MD_ID, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES,
 (
 select RULE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES
 minus
 select RULE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.RULE_ID = STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.RULE_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.REFRESH_DATETIME
